description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a detached garage, set on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway and green lawn areas. The main building features a symmetrical facade with double-hung windows, a central front door, and a gable roof. The garage is positioned to the left of the house, connected by the driveway, and has a single car parked in front. Mature trees and shrubs are distributed around the property, providing shade and landscaping. The rear of the house includes a patio area and a small pool, with additional windows and a secondary entrance. The exterior is finished in light-colored siding with dark gray roofing, giving the house a classic, clean appearance.
description: A two-story suburban house with a detached garage, paved driveway, and landscaped yard featuring trees and a small pool. The house has a symmetrical facade, gable roof, and light-colored exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, detached garage, driveway, and a car parked in front.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the garage, backyard patio, pool, and additional windows; landscaping is visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage, side entrance, pool, and more of the lawn and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the garage, secondary entrance, and more greenery.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small steps, flanked by windows, and a simple overhang.
